## Summary

Describe the change and the operational problem it solves.

## Classification

- [ ] Production fix
- [ ] Feature/enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] DevOps/release
- [ ] Security/data-policy

## Data Policy Check

- [ ] No raw customer dumps committed
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, keys, or certificates committed
- [ ] No generated operational outputs committed
- [ ] Build/package artifacts are published as release assets, not committed to Git

## Validation

Describe the commands, tests, logs, or manual checks used to verify the change.

## Release Impact

Describe whether this needs a release, package rebuild, or operator communication.
